metadata.name: Select Photos for a Photo Essay

description: A photographer has submitted 200 photos from an event. A photo editor must select the 10-15 best images that tell a cohesive story.

nodes.task_description: Review all 200 photos, giving each a preliminary rating for technical quality and emotional impact.

expected_outcome.value: All photos are reviewed and rated.

nodes.task_description: Select a short list of the 30-40 strongest images.

expected_outcome.value: The pool of photos is narrowed down.

nodes.task_description: Arrange the shortlisted photos into a sequence that creates a compelling visual narrative with a beginning, middle, and end.

expected_outcome.value: The final selection of photos tells a story.

nodes.task_description: Write a short caption for each of the final photos.

expected_outcome.value: All selected photos have descriptive captions.
